title: Escalation Evaluation (Background Service)
content:
start([START: EscalationEvaluatorService runs on schedule
configurable interval])

s1[1. Query all open actions with escalation rules
JOIN actions ON escalation_rules
WHERE action.state NOT IN terminal states
AND escalation_rules.is_active = true]
subgraph loop ["For each action with escalation rules"]

sa[a. Calculate time elapsed
time_in_state = now - last_state_change_at
time_since_creation = now - created_at]

sc[c. Determine current escalation tier
Match elapsed time against tier ladder
e.g., Tier 1 24h, Tier 2 48h, Tier 3 72h]

sd[d. Record escalation event
INSERT actions.action_audit_events
with tier, notified parties
Phase 1 audit event only]

force[Force transition to configured target state
Bypasses guards — system-initiated
Record ActionStateHistory
with escalation_triggered=true]

se[e. Record escalation in audit trail
INSERT actions.action_audit_events
action_id, event_type='escalation.triggered',
details tier, threshold, elapsed_time]
